'''Corsair Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], equipped with [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], that was formed by [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] three years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was one of three such units ([[Talon Squadron (New Republic)|Talon]], Corsair and [[Gauntlet Squadron|Gauntlet]]) formed by the former [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] to relieve the pressure placed on the elite Squadron by [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]]. Some of Corsair's pilots served in the replacement Rogue Squadron temporarily led by Hobbie, while the real Rogue Squadron took part in unsanctioned [[Battle of Thyferra|attacks on]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

Corsair Squadron served as part of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] fleet during the search for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] and his fleet, and was part of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' flight group during the [[Battle of Selaggis]]. During this battle, it is extremely likely that Corsair Squadron suffered heavy losses when the ''[[Second Death]]'' exploded to cover the escape of the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]
